title: Der Demütige und die Tänzerin
writer: Ewald André Dupont, Max Glass, Felix Hollaender
actors: Georg Baselt, Paul Bildt, Lil Dagover
plot: Toni wants to become an opera-singer. Her mother was once simple chanteuse. Toni marries the brutal industrialist Liesegang. An Italian doctor falls in love with Toni. He want's to see Liesegang dead.
